title: WATER AND WASTEWATER BILL CREDIT PROGRAMS - 211info
text: CITY OF NEWBERG WATER AND WASTEWATER BILL CREDIT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly credit on water and sewer accounts. Active accounts for water and sewer services receive a monthly $25 credit, and active accounts billed with water services only receive a monthly $15 credit. If approved, credits are applied for 12 months. 414 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Low income households, active duty military members, and veterans who have a current account that is not more than 30 days past due Hours: Applications only accepted from June 1-June 30 Email (503) 537-1205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 537-1205 Utility Billing Department Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Military: active duty photo ID, supporting documentation, and/or discharge documents Low-income households must supply one or more of the following documents: Supplemental Social Security Income (SSI) verification, Oregon Medical Card, Supplemental Nutrition Assistnace Program (SNAP) card or award letter with date of reward, Medicaid card, Free/Reduced School Lunch/Breakfast Program letter from the Newberg School District indicating school year LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Newberg Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Sewer Service * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Discounted Water Service Discounted Water Service * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF NEWBERG If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF NEWBERG
